title: Smooth Material
description: 一个柔和简洁且实用的材质包 A soft, simple and practical resource pack
body:
### 中文
- Smooth Material柔和材质，更改了主世界许多自然方块以及少量实体的材质，使其更加柔和护眼。例如更醒目的矿物，更柔和的草地，更护眼的下界岩，更透光的树叶，更清澈的水体，更醒目的苦力怕等等。这使其非常适用于UHC等竞技类玩法。
- 本资源包有两个版本，区别是有无边框（无边框版本将在不久后发布）
- 兼容性：Minecraft 1.13 +
### English
- Smooth Material (Soft material): The materials of many natural blocks and a few physical entities in the main world have been changed to make them more soft and eye-friendly. For instance, more eye-catching minerals, softer grasslands, more eye-protecting Netherrack, more transparent leaves, clearer water bodies, more conspicuous creeper, and so on. This makes it highly suitable for competitive gameplay such as UHC.
- This resource package has two versions. The difference is whether it has a border or not (the unframed version will be released soon).
- Compatibility: Minecraft 1.13 +
